about.title: About Me
about.p1: Hello there! 👋 I'm Kevin, a passionate software engineer who loves creating elegant solutions to complex problems.
about.p2: I specialize in building modern web applications with a focus on user experience and clean code. When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open source, or enjoying the outdoors.
